bead.title: operator-prompts: SvelteKit prompt input + preview + recent-bead pane + approve UI + Playwright incl. XSS
bead.description: Frontend: prompt-input page; preview of how the bead would look; recent operator-prompt-spawned beads pane; approve UI for proposed prompts. Playwright e2e includes XSS vector tests.
bead.acceptance: 1. /operator-prompts page exists. 2. Preview shows bead shape pre-submit. 3. Recent-bead pane shows last 10 operator-prompt-spawned beads. 4. Approve UI for proposed prompts. 5. Playwright e2e + XSS tests pass.
